$schema: Source of truth for docs/30-rai-architecture-live.md. Edit this, then `npm run regen-arch`.

engine_modules.name: Pattern scan
engine_modules.what: Local regex scanner. Zero-cost, runs on every surface. Detects known signatures across L-2/L-1/L0.

engine_modules.name: Semantic scan
engine_modules.what: Claude API scanner. Default Haiku, escalates to Sonnet when confidence < 0.65. Covers L-2/L-1/L0/L1.

engine_modules.name: BS Council
engine_modules.what: 4-agent verifiability layer. Heterogeneous providers (Anthropic + Together + Ollama) across 3 diversity axes. Verdicts: CONFIRMED / CONTESTED / UNVERIFIED / FALSE-ALARM. Covers L1/L2/L3.

engine_modules.name: ActionGate
engine_modules.what: Agent action firewall. Lineage tracking + OAuth scope attestation. MCP adapter + shell adapter + native-messaging-host adapter all implemented. Phantom adaptive layer next to it.

engine_modules.name: Phantom adaptive
engine_modules.what: Adaptive threat layer next to L4 — learns per-agent action patterns to flag unfamiliar side-effects. Companion to ActionGate.

engine_modules.name: Memory / Sensing
engine_modules.what: Distributed sensing + threat-signature store. Phase 1: local-only private layer + cross-surface ingest endpoint + dream-phase distillation. Phase 2: community pool with differential privacy.

surfaces.name: Browser Extension (Chrome MV3)
surfaces.what: Right-click scan + ambient DOM scan on AI sites.

surfaces.name: NanoClaw (Claude Code hook)
surfaces.what: PreToolUse hook. Tim's own dev environment.

surfaces.name: Native Messaging Host (ActionGate adapter)
surfaces.what: L4 gate bridge — VCCE for Chrome → local policy engine.

surfaces.name: VPS Distributed Sensing Node
surfaces.what: Ingest endpoint for cross-surface scan events. Smoke test pending.

data_flow: Surface (extension / pwa / telegram / nanoclaw) emits scan event
P0 runs locally on every surface (zero-cost regex)
If P0 flags → P1 (Haiku, BYOK) for semantic verdict
If P1 confidence low OR L1 misinfo → P2 BS Council (4-agent heterogeneous council)
All verdicts written to ScanLog → ingest-server → Memory/Sensing layer
Dream Phase (offline) distills patterns → ThreatSignature store → seeds next P0 patterns
L4 ActionGate (spec) intercepts agent actions pre-execution
